title: Helping 6 Business Owners Scale in 33 Minutes
creator: alexhormozi
rationale: MULTI-stranger case-study chassis (6 businesses in 33 min ≈ 5.5 min each). Tests whether multi-stranger format uses the same TwoCamInterviewSlide as the single-stranger OQf2Ba (M1) or upgrades to a person-roster chrome / split-screen rotation. NEW chassis candidate.
